description:
Log into Moodle (admin / Admin1234!) and create an interactive branching Lesson activity named 'Initial Isolation and Protective Action' in the 'Hazmat First Responder Training' course. 

Materials are provided in ~/Documents/LessonData/.

Create exactly 3 Content Pages (Branch Tables) with the following structure:

Page 1: Title 'Scene Arrival'. Content from Scene_Arrival.txt. Embed the image placard_1090.jpg into this page's content. 
- Choice 1: 'Approach immediately to rescue victims' -> Jumps to 'Failure Protocol' page.
- Choice 2: 'Stay upwind, uphill, and isolate the area' -> Jumps to 'Protective Actions' page.

Page 2: Title 'Failure Protocol'. Content from Failure.txt.
- Choice 1: 'Restart Scenario' -> Jumps to 'Scene Arrival' page.

Page 3: Title 'Protective Actions'. Content from Success.txt.
- Choice 1: 'Complete Scenario' -> Jumps to End of lesson.
